Potential XSS in WelcomeResource: user input flows to HTML response from [user-controlled source](2).

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name HTML injection in WelcomeResource admin setup
 * @description Checks if admin username from POST request is reflected unencoded in HTML response
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/welcome-resource-html-injection
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Find all string concatenations with HTML that include user-controlled request parameters
// in WelcomeResource and QuarkusWelcomeResource

from MethodCall mc, Method m
where
  m = mc.getMethod() and
  (
    m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("javax.ws.rs.core", "Response") or
    m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("javax.ws.rs.core", "Response$ResponseBuilder")
  ) and
  m.hasName("entity") and
  (
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.keycloak.services.resources", "WelcomeResource") or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.keycloak.quarkus.runtime.services.resources", "QuarkusWelcomeResource")
  )
select mc, "Response entity() call in WelcomeResource at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + 
  " - argument type: " + mc.getArgument(0).getType().toString()
findings.hypothesis: Examining all response.entity() calls in WelcomeResource to understand what HTML content is being returned

message.text: Response entity() call in WelcomeResource at line 205 - argument type: String
Response entity() call in WelcomeResource at line 210 - argument type: String

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name XSS via SAML POST form - SAML values embedded in HTML without encoding
 * @description Checks if SAML response data (RelayState, SAMLResponse) are embedded in HTML auto-submit forms
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/saml-post-form-xss
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Find where HtmlUtils.escapeAttribute or htmlEncode is NOT called before embedding 
// SAML values in POST forms

from MethodCall mc, Method getMethod
where
  // Find calls to methods that build SAML POST form HTML
  mc.getMethod().hasName("getSAMLResponse") or
  mc.getMethod().hasName("getRelayState") or  
  mc.getMethod().hasName("getSamlResponse")
select mc, "SAML value retrieval in " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + 
  "." + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " - check if properly HTML-encoded when embedded in forms"
findings.hypothesis: SAML POST form values (SAMLResponse, RelayState) embedded in HTML forms without HTML encoding
